summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PDS dental supplies management system. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. System successfully loaded with 285 products, 6 clients, and 6 suppliers from Excel data.
passed_tests: Dashboard statistics loading (285 products, 6 clients, 6 suppliers)
Products CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, search)
Data integration between frontend and backend
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (22/22 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and integrations working)
